creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
Created attachment 222875
Shar file to ros-vcstool

New port: ros-vcstool. It is the replacement for devel/ros-wstool. I think we should probably keep ros-wstool around for a little bit longer, but its days are numbered.

Unfortunately, there is also ros-vcstools, which are libraries that ros-vcstool depends on.

Thanks to Henrik Gulbrandsen for doing all the heavy lifting.
